scripts.build: pnpm --filter @guga-agent/core build && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node ../../scripts/fix-esm-extensions.mjs dist
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @guga-agent/core build && pnpm --filter @guga-agent/plugin-audit-export build && pnpm --filter @guga-agent/plugin-mcp build && pnpm --filter @guga-agent/plugin-ops-health build && pnpm --filter @guga-agent/plugin-skills build && pnpm --filter @guga-agent/plugin-tools-filesystem build && pnpm --filter @guga-agent/plugin-tools-git build && pnpm --filter @guga-agent/plugin-tools-shell build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
